channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: NHIA expands healthcare access for vulnerable Nigerians
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The NHIA is expanding healthcare access for vulnerable Nigerians through targeted financing programs like the Basic Healthcare Provision Fund, ensuring no
Read More: https://punchng.com/nhia-expands-healthcare-access-for-vulnerable-nigerians/

item.title: Kane rejects England 'division,' backs Bellingham
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Captain Harry Kane has dismissed the idea of division in the England squad, insisting there is "complete togetherness" ahead of the World Cup semifinal with Argentina.

item.title: 🥤 Why hydration breaks could be here to stay
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: FIFA's mandated three-minute breaks have been a talking point throughout the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Yamal: France SF most important match of career
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Spain winger Lamine Yamal has described the World Cup semifinal against France as "the most important match" in his career.

item.title: Alonso: Chelsea job over Liverpool 'about timings'...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso has said that his decision to join Chelsea over Liverpool was "about timings."

item.title: Balogun joins LeBron's agency after breakout WC
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: United States forward Folarin Balogun has signed with LeBron James' agency Klutch Sports following a breakout World Cup that elevated his profile on and off the pitch.

item.title: Sources: Man Utd in advanced talks for Tielemans
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manchester United are in advanced talks to sign Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa, sources have told ESPN.

item.title: Haaland, Norway return home to heroes' welcome
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Erling Haaland and his Norway teammates were welcomed home by a crowd of thousands following their historic World Cup achievements in North America.

item.title: Police investigating death of South Africa's Adams...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Police said Monday they are investigating the death of South Africa World Cup football player Jayden Adams, after his body was discovered this weekend at a property in the city of Cape Town.

item.title: France boss: Spain favorites for 'spectacular' sem...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: France head coach Didier Deschamps deflected questions about his team's World Cup favorite status and projected a "spectacular game" against Spain in Tuesday's semifinal.

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:

item.description:

item.description:

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Fear gripped the University of Jos (UNIJOS) community on Tuesday after the beheaded body of a middle-aged man was discovered on a farmland at the institution’s Permanent Site. The deceased, whose identity had yet to be officially confirmed at the time of filing this report, was found with his

item.title: England World Cup semi-final and final? A reminder of where and when!
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: A reminder of where and when England's semi-final against Argentina takes place and, if they get that far, when to make a note in your diary for the final.

item.title: Reps withdraw own state police bill
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The House of Representatives has withdrawn its proposed constitutional amendment seeking to establish state police and will instead consider a similar bill submitted by the Executive. He cited the party’s lingering internal crisis and leadership disputes. Nafada, also a former PDP govern

item.title: World Cup: Hugo Lloris reveals Deschamps’ instruction to N’Golo Kante to stop Messi

The Argentine star faced challenges in the group stage of the tournament, managing to score only one goal

item.title: Citi Stock Traders Post Record Revenue for Quarter
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Citigroup says revenue from equities trading surged 45% to $2.3 billion in the second quarter from a year earlier. That's 11% higher than the record set in this year's opening months. Earnings per share came in at $3.15, beating all estimates. This is coverage from "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source:

item.title: US Consumer Inflation Cools To 3.5% In June
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The consumer price index (CPI) rose by 3.5 per cent on a year-on-year basis, down from a 4.2 per cent increase in May, said the Labor Department. The post US Consumer Inflation Cools To 3.5% In June appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: ITF Screens 225,000 Artisans Nationwide For Global Certification, Jobs
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Industrial Training Fund (ITF) has commenced the nationwide screening of 225,000 practising artisans under its Skill Up Artisans (SUPA) programme, a Federal Government initiative designed to equip Nigerian artisans with globally competitive skills, internationally recognised certification and ac

item.title: June was deadliest month for Ukrainian civilians in four years, UN says
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: More than 293 Ukrainian civilians were killed and 1,990 wounded in Russian strikes across the country in the month of June, making it the highest toll in any single month since April 2022, the UN monitoring mission in Ukraine said Tuesday. The UN has recorded 16,431 verified civilian deaths in Ukrai

item.title: Farmer found beheaded in University of Jos
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: There was palpable fear in the University of Jos (UNIJOS) community on Tuesday after a farmer’s lifeless body was discovered on a farmland at the institution’s permanent site with his head severed. University authorities confirmed that the victim was neither a student nor a member of staff but

item.description: Live-service games and the companies that run them are in big trouble. Games and their developers are getting shut down and gutted, and publishers' huge promises are dubious. Meanwhile, EverQuest, one of the original live-service games, is thundering back more than 25 years later. EverQuest Legends

item.title: Fed Has ‘No Tolerance’ for Elevated Inflation, Warsh Says
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said, “The members of our committee have no tolerance for persistently elevated inflation,” as part of testimony he’s scheduled to deliver to the House Financial Services Committee on Tuesday morning. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomb

item.title: Otukpo Monarch Orders Armed Herders, Terrorists Out Of Idoma Land
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The traditional ruler of Otukpo District, the Och’Otukpo Odu, Chief Dr. John Eimonye, has ordered all armed herders and bandits operating within his domain to immediately leave every part of Idoma land. The directive followed the recent deadly attack on Otukpo-Nobi community, where suspected a

item.title: US CPI Falls for the First Time Since 2020, Core Gauge Flat
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: US consumer prices declined in June for the first time in six years and a key gauge of underlying inflation was little changed, taking some pressure off the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

item.title: Nigerian Breweries: Why 81% equity concentration matters to investors
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay Markets
item.description: For investors tracking Nigerian Breweries Plc, the company’s commanding N2.29 trillion market valuation comes with a striking structural reality: the read more Nigerian Breweries: Why 81% equity concentration matters to investors

item.title: BREAKING: 2027: Niger Gov Bago Retains Deputy Yakubu Garba as Running Mate
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Niger State Governor Umaru Bago has announced Deputy Governor Yakubu Garba as his running mate for the 2027 governorship election. Details later… The post BREAKING: 2027: Niger Gov Bago Retains Deputy Yakubu Garba as Running Mate appeared first on Trending News.

item.title: SDP salutes Soyinka at 92, says his legacy inspires generations
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: According to Aiyenigba, Soyinka has continued to inspire Nigerians and give them hope during difficult times.

item.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

item.title: Warsh Says Fed Has ‘No Tolerance’ for Elevated Inflation
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh said policymakers at the central bank have no tolerance for high inflation, reiterating a vow to tame price growth that has been elevated for five years.

item.title: Police arrest two suspected kingpins over sale of dummy phones in Adamawa
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Adamawa State Police Command has arrested two suspected kingpins allegedly involved in defrauding unsuspecting customers by selling dummy phones through a network of agents across the state. The command’s spokesperson, SP Suleiman Nguroje, disclosed this in a statement while identifying the susp
